fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontArguments` is a `ref struct` that describes how to select and customize a font from a
typeface. It specifies the face index within a TTC collection, the color palette to use, color
palette overrides, and a variation design position.

Pass an `SKFontArguments` to
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.CreateTypeface(SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments)> to create a typeface
configured with the specified arguments.

## Examples

```csharp
// Select the second face in a TTC collection and apply the bold named instance.
using var typeface = SKTypeface.FromFile("NotoSansCJK.ttc");
var args = new SKFontArguments
{
    CollectionIndex = 1,
    PaletteIndex = 0,
};
using var customFace = typeface.CreateTypeface(args);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Describes arguments used to select and customize a font from a typeface.

fields.value: The zero-based face index. The default is <c>0</c> (the first face).
fields.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the face to use within a font collection (TTC) file.

fields.value: The zero-based palette index. The default is <c>0</c>.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the color palette to use.

fields.value: A <see cref="T:System.ReadOnlySpan`1" /> of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> values. The default is empty.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the color palette overrides to apply.

fields.value: A <see cref="T:System.ReadOnlySpan`1" /> of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values defining the design-space location. The default is empty.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the variation design position specifying axis coordinates.
